chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 353 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1414/2023 2. For hearing of main case 07.03.2025 Mr. Naveed Anjum, advocate for the petitioner Messrs. Ashraf Ali Butt and Rehmat-un-Nisa, advocates for respondent along with Mr. Haider Sial, C.E.O. Cantonment Board Faisal Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Pursuant to order dated 28.02.2025, Mr. Haider Sial, Chief Executive Officer Cantonment Board Faisal is present and states that this matter is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2022 CLC 2002, therefore, it may be disposed of in the same terms. Learned counsel for the petitioner also seeks the same relief. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
